startUrls.title: Start URLs (crawl mode)
startUrls.description: Publisher landing pages to crawl for article links. The crawler will discover article URLs from these pages.

articleUrls.title: Article URLs (deterministic mode)
articleUrls.description: Direct article page URLs to fetch without crawling. Use this when you already know the exact article pages. Skips link discovery entirely.

maxPagesPerDomain.title: Max pages per domain (crawl mode)
maxPagesPerDomain.description: Maximum number of article pages to enqueue per domain during crawl mode.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel browser pages.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max request retries
maxRequestRetries.description: How many times to retry a failed request before giving up.

minWords.title: Minimum word count
minWords.description: Pages with fewer words than this threshold are skipped — unless they contain PDF links.

dateFrom.title: Date from (optional)
dateFrom.description: Skip articles published before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave blank for no date gating — recommended for clinical guidelines which are evergreen.

onlyInside.title: Only follow same-domain links
onlyInside.description: In crawl mode, restrict link-following to the same domain as the start URL.

onlyNew.title: Skip previously seen URLs
onlyNew.description: Skip URLs that were seen in a previous run (uses citation-crawler-state dataset for deduplication).

saveHtml.title: Save raw HTML
saveHtml.description: Include the raw HTML of each page in the output. Increases storage usage significantly.

proxy.title: Proxy configuration
proxy.description: Apify proxy settings. Use for publisher sites that block direct requests.
